# FixTheVuln

> Free cybersecurity education platform with interactive tools, certification study planners, practice quizzes, vulnerability tracking, and compliance guides.

FixTheVuln (fixthevuln.com) helps security professionals and students learn cybersecurity through hands-on tools and structured study resources. The site covers 60+ certification paths across CompTIA, AWS, Microsoft, Cisco, ISC2, ISACA, GIAC, EC-Council, OffSec, Google Cloud, HashiCorp, and Kubernetes. All content is free.

## Main Sections

- [Homepage](https://fixthevuln.com/)
- [Start Here](https://fixthevuln.com/start-here.html)
- [Security Guides](https://fixthevuln.com/guides.html)
- [Interactive Tools](https://fixthevuln.com/tools.html)
- [Compliance Guides](https://fixthevuln.com/compliance.html)
- [Practice Quizzes](https://fixthevuln.com/practice-tests.html)
- [Career Paths](https://fixthevuln.com/career-paths.html)
- [CVE Lookup](https://fixthevuln.com/cve-lookup.html)
- [KEV Archive](https://fixthevuln.com/kev-archive.html)
- [Resources](https://fixthevuln.com/resources.html)
- [Study Planner Store](https://fixthevuln.com/store/store.html)
